selection_note: Selected baseline: compact oxidizer storage and strongest VTVL analog; two-phase injector risk is the dominant development item.
Backup: best N2O/alcohol literature and cooling conductivity; less convenient fuel procurement.
Alternate if two-phase N2O is unacceptable; gas storage and oxygen hardware dominate cost/mass.
Valid GOX alternate; slightly better computed Isp but less directly validated than GOX/ethanol.
Near miss only: compact and similar Isp, but oxidizer access, decomposition, catalyst/ignition, and compatibility risks are severe.
